message:
fix: address 5 bugs in CLI backend and postinstall patch

1. Patch script safety net placement: was inside the else block
   (harmless but wrong); now correctly placed after the if/else block.

2. resolveCliCommand caching: was running up to 3 `which` subprocesses
   on every call to getAvailableProviders(); now cached by key.

3. CLI prompt via stdin: was passing prompt as a CLI argument which can
   exceed OS arg length limits (~128KB) on long reflection prompts; now
   piped via stdin using Bun.spawn's ReadableStream support.

4. extractJsonFromOutput greedy regex: `{[\s\S]*}` matched from first
   `{` to last `}` including prose with braces; now tries JSON.parse
   first, then fences, then scans for the first valid JSON substring.

5. Removed dead no-op replace in patch script (replaced string with
   itself).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
